blogs.title: Back-of-the-Envelope Calculations
blogs.description: A practical guide to back-of-the-envelope estimation for system design — traffic, storage, bandwidth, server capacity, and power-of-2 reference values
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: REST vs gRPC vs GraphQL
blogs.description: A comprehensive comparison of REST, gRPC, and GraphQL API paradigms covering architecture, performance, tooling, and when to use each approach in modern system design
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: TCP vs UDP
blogs.description: A comprehensive comparison of TCP and UDP protocols covering the three-way handshake, flow control, congestion control, connectionless communication, and use cases for each
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: DNS & HTTP Fundamentals
blogs.description: A deep dive into DNS resolution, record types, HTTP protocol evolution, caching strategies, and CDN fundamentals for system design interviews and real-world architecture
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Consistency Patterns
blogs.description: An in-depth guide to consistency patterns in distributed systems — strong consistency, eventual consistency, read-after-write, monotonic reads, monotonic writes, and quorum-based approaches
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: ACID vs BASE
blogs.description: A detailed comparison of ACID and BASE transaction models — understanding atomicity, consistency, isolation, durability versus basically available, soft state, and eventual consistency
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: CAP Theorem
blogs.description: An in-depth exploration of the CAP theorem — Consistency, Availability, Partition Tolerance — with real-world examples of CP, AP, and CA systems and the PACELC extension
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: What is System Design?
blogs.description: A comprehensive introduction to system design — understanding its goals, principles, and the step-by-step process for building scalable, reliable, and maintainable distributed systems
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Database Sharding
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to database sharding in system design, covering sharding strategies, key selection, re-sharding, and implementation for scaling databases
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Caching Strategies
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to caching strategies in system design, covering multi-level caching, cache patterns, eviction policies, and implementation for improved performance
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Load Balancing
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to load balancing in system design, covering types of load balancers, algorithms, health checks, and implementation strategies
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Scalability Introduction
blogs.description: A comprehensive introduction to scalability concepts in system design, covering vertical vs horizontal scaling, types of scaling, and key principles
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari
